demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I coughed hard, and it felt like a knife went straight into my spine. The pain is agonizing and wraps around my ribs.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on suddenly three hours ago right after a coughing fit and it is so bad I can't find any position that's comfortable or move around my house.

symptom_narrative.onset: about three hours ago, immediately after a hard coughing fit
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for the last three hours
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, stabbing, like a knife in the middle of my back that wraps around both sides of my ribs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonizing — the worst pain I can remember; I can't get comfortable at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the middle of my back, between the shoulder blades, spreading around my ribcage on both sides
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time, no let-up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing I've tried helps; my usual painkillers aren't touching it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: taking a deep breath and any movement make it much worse, so I'm breathing shallowly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel like I've been getting shorter over the last few years and my upper back has become quite rounded
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing this sudden before, but I broke my wrist a few years ago after a small trip
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't move around, I'm stuck sitting rigidly, and I can't manage anything at home tonight on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: thinning of the bones — I've been told my bones are weak
broke my wrist after tripping on a rug
past_medical_history.how_managed: it was put in a cast and healed

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; usually independent but tonight cannot manage basic tasks because of the pain and being unable to move

objective_data_offered.value: clearly rounded, hunched upper back with a pronounced curve at the top of the spine
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance on video only; not a clinician measurement

objective_data_offered.value: sitting very rigidly and upright, taking small shallow breaths, wincing on any movement
moving my whole body in one piece because twisting hurts too much
